completion_summary: Preregistered an untouched seeds 500-519 Safe-GP confirmation, ran 240 complete campaigns with zero failures, independently replayed all distinct trajectories and recomputed statistics. Safety and cost passed all tasks and objective direction was positive in all tasks, but flow mean effect 0.018752 missed SESOI 0.02, so the frozen joint rule and confirmatory slice claim failed and no benchmark or publication claim is allowed.
scope: Preregister and execute an untouched Bench comparison of the fixed recipe-space-0.2 safe GP against random and unconstrained GP, with taskwise objective, safety, cost, replay, provenance, and independent audit gates
